title: ENERGY CONSERVATION SERVICES - 211info
text: ENERGY TRUST OF OREGON ENERGY CONSERVATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides cash incentives and support for energy-saving and renewable energy projects in homes, industrial, and agricultural businesses. Incentives help pay for upgrades like insulation, duct sealing, heat pumps (which heat and cool homes), and efficient water heaters in single-family and multifamily homes. Some upgrades may also qualify for state and federal tax credits. Also offers free and low-cost tips to help save energy and reduce bills 920 SW Sixth Avenue Suite 900 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Varies by service. Serves Portland General Electric, Pacific Power, Cascade Natural Gas, and Avista customers in Oregon and NW Natural customers in Oregon and Washington. Services are available for homeowners, condo and townhome owners, and renters. Income guidelines vary by program. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email - (866) 368-7878 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (866) 368-7878 Toll-free Toll-free (866) 368-7878 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Energy Information Services Residential Energy/Water Conservation Rebates Weatherization Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ENERGY TRUST OF OREGON
